name: taskflow-postman-tests
description: Blackbox API test suite for the TaskFlow API, run via Postman or Newman (CLI).

scripts.test:local: newman run collections/TaskFlow.postman_collection.json -e environments/local.postman_environment.json --folder Health --folder Auth --folder Tasks --folder "Cross-User Ownership" -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export newman-reports/local-report.html
scripts.test:production: newman run collections/TaskFlow.postman_collection.json -e environments/production.postman_environment.json --folder Health --folder Auth --folder Tasks --folder "Cross-User Ownership" -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export newman-reports/production-report.html
scripts.test:data-driven:local: newman run collections/TaskFlow.postman_collection.json -e environments/local.postman_environment.json --folder "Data-Driven Validation" -d data/register-validation-data.csv -r cli,htmlextra --reporter-htmlextra-export newman-reports/data-driven-report.html
